Bug / Task Description: The LRU cache evicts the most-recently-used entry instead of the least-recently-used entry when it reaches capacity. Keys that were just accessed or inserted are removed on the next Put, while stale keys are preserved. Fix the eviction logic so that the entry with the oldest last-access time is evicted.
Commit Subject: fix(lru): evict least-recently-used entry instead of most-recently-used
